task_text: Design doc (no code): turn Flyer Studio from extractor-only into extractor + bounded Hermes creative planner. Define the product contract — Hermes-first split (grounded extractor vs bounded creative planner), [Hermes]/[net-new] step table, provenance lifecycle (customer_text/customer_profile/hermes_inferred/customer_confirmed), hard-fact firewall (including free-text creative claims), intent-aware QA (count/pricing-model/item-price reconciliation), category/clarification gate, flag rollout plan, review gates before build. Replaces the brittle hardcoded FAMOUS_ITEM_SETS creative-fill and fixes its provenance mislabeling.
